title: ジャパンダートダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japan Dirt Derby, the race
that'll determine the classic year dirt champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is impressed and fired up by how
capable and ready the runners of Oi look. She
then throws herself onto the festival stage.
